name: rentacar
description: Autocunha Rent-a-Car — API + painel (deploy único Railway)

scripts.build:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.setup:local: pnpm db:up && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed
scripts.build:railway: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @workspace/rentacar-dashboard run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
